name: novel-to-game
description: 把小说转成游戏企划与可完整游玩的网页游戏原型。

interface.shortDescription: Turn novels into playable game prototypes
interface.longDescription: Design and build culturally grounded playable game adaptations from novels.
defaultPrompt: Turn this novel into a complete 15-minute game prototype.
Compare three game concepts for this novel before choosing one.
